name: Rohan Mehta
why: I have been following Allbotix since its early days and I deeply align with the mission of making industrial automation accessible. My background in ROS2 and embedded systems makes me a strong fit.

name: Priya Sharma
why: Having worked in B2B SaaS sales across manufacturing clients, I want to transition into the robotics space where I can sell products I genuinely believe will reshape industries.

name: Aditya Patel
why: I specialize in computer vision and want to apply it to real-world robotics perception problems. Allbotix's work on humanoid navigation is exactly the kind of challenge I want to tackle.

name: Sneha Kulkarni
why: I have managed cross-functional teams delivering automation projects for automotive clients. I want to bring that execution discipline to a fast-growing robotics startup like Allbotix.

name: Karan Desai
why: Designing robotic end-effectors and actuator assemblies is what I do best. I want to work on products that go beyond prototypes and actually hit factory floors at scale.

name: Meera Nair
why: I built the content pipeline at a deeptech startup from scratch and grew organic traffic 4x in a year. I want to do the same for Allbotix and help the brand reflect the quality of its technology.

name: Vikram Singh
why: Low-level motor control and real-time OS work is my core strength. I have shipped firmware for 3 production robots and want to bring that experience to a team pushing the frontier.

name: Divya Joshi
why: After closing enterprise deals in industrial IoT for seven years, I want to step into robotics where the deals are more complex and the impact is tangible. Allbotix has the right product and the right timing.

name: Arjun Kapoor
why: My thesis was on trajectory optimization for collaborative robots. I want to work somewhere my research can become a product people actually use on factory floors within months, not decades.

name: Pooja Verma
why: Scaling a people-first culture inside a hardware-software company is one of the hardest and most exciting challenges in HR. I want to help Allbotix hire and retain the talent that will define Indian robotics.
